prompt: A vibrant anime-style close-up of a cute DJ girl in a magical rave scene, framed from a slightly low angle as if the viewer is standing in front of the DJ booth. She has a short bob haircut with blonde with rainbow-dyed ends, fluffy bangs, and tall bunny ears, with the inner left ear showing a rainbow gradient. Her face is mostly obscured by a centered rectangular censor block in soft beige-pink, but the pose should imply a playful wink and a mischievous grin. She wears oversized heart-shaped sunglasses on top of her head, one blue frame and one red frame, with glossy purple-tinted lenses. One hand is pressing a large rainbow-colored headphone cup against her ear, while the other arm reaches forward toward the viewer over the DJ console, creating an energetic performance feel as if she is about to drop the next track. She is dressed in an oversized white hoodie with a large green butterfly emblem on the chest and 4 stitched heart patches on the sleeves and shoulder area: 1 orange, 1 purple, 1 blue, and 1 red. In the foreground, show part of a glowing DJ mixer with colorful neon controls, knobs, and a luminous pink heart icon. The background is a dreamy, hyper-sparkly club fantasy filled with glowing stars, hearts, glitter bokeh, pastel light beams, and soft rainbow highlights, with an "emo" yet kawaii atmosphere. Use highly polished anime illustration, glossy lighting, soft bloom, iridescent reflections, saturated rainbow accents, and a cute, energetic idol-DJ aesthetic.
